channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Taiwan: 40% Shift of Chip Capacity to US 'Impossible'
item.description: It would be "impossible" to move 40% of Taiwan's semiconductor capacity to the U.S., the island's top tariff negotiator said, pushing back against rec...

item.title: HOT TAKES: Bad Bunny's Super Bowl Halftime Show Performance Was a Middle Finger to America
Trump: Bad Bunny's Super Bowl Halftime Show Was 'Absolutely Terrible'
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Sunday in a social media post that the Super Bowl halftime show fronted by singer Bad Bunny was "absolutely terrible."

item.title: Live Nation Execs in Talks With DOJ to Avert Trial
item.description: Live Nation executives and lobbyists are in talks with senior officials at the U.S. Department of Justice in a bid to avoid a trial over allegations t...

item.title: Massie, Khanna to visit DOJ to review unredacted Epstein files
item.description: Reps. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., and Ro Khanna, D-Calif., say they will visit the Justice Department on Monday to read unredacted versions of documents fro...

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Talks With Tehran Require Strength, Not Wishful Thinking
Trump Predicts 100K Dow by End of Presidency
item.description: President Donald Trump hailed his first year of his second term in office, predicting the stock market will double in less than two years after the Do...

item.title: N.Y. Gov. Candidate Blakeman Picks Sheriff for Running Mate
item.description: Republican gubernatorial candidate Bruce Blakeman is expected to announce Fulton County Sheriff Richard Giardino as his running mate in New York's 202...

item.title: Trump defends Minneapolis federal enforcement, says crime plunged after ‘thousands of criminals’ removed
item.description: President Trump claims crime has dropped as much as 30% in Minneapolis after federal agents removed thousands of "hardened criminals" from the city.

item.title: Wonder Why the WaPo Is Failing? Leftist Rag's Pick for 'Most Relevant' NFL Player Tells You All
The world’s top nuclear powers have no arsenal limits, here are the countries with nukes
item.description: The expiration of the New START treaty leaves more than 10,000 U.S. and Russia nuclear weapons unconstrained for the first time in decades.

item.title: Leftie 'Whitelash' Commentator Stunned When He Asks Voters: Would You Vote the Same Way Again?
President Trump Refuses to Eat Crow, Faces the Press on AF-1 Following the ‘Racist’ Video
SCOOP: Trump ally Kid Rock jumps into key governor's race with high-profile endorsement
item.description: Kid Rock endorses Rep. John James for Michigan governor in 2026 race to succeed Gretchen Whitmer. The Detroit native musician backs the GOP frontrunne...

item.title: The single crushing problem American cattle ranchers wish Trump would fix instead
item.description: Trump expands beef imports to cut prices, but American cattle ranchers say the real problem squeezing their profits lies elsewhere.
